# Metric Catalog

This file is generated from `crates/moshwatch-core/src/observability.rs`. It is the canonical exported metrics contract for Prometheus/OpenMetrics and OTLP.

| Metric | Type | Unit | Labels | Minimum Detail Tier | Privacy | Cardinality | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `moshwatch_build_info` | `info` | `1` | `version` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Build information for moshwatchd. |
| `moshwatch_observer_info` | `info` | `1` | `observer` | `per_session` | `operator_sensitive` | `static` | Host identity for this moshwatchd instance. |
| `moshwatch_sessions` | `gauge` | `1` | `kind` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Number of sessions by kind. |
| `moshwatch_sessions_by_health` | `gauge` | `1` | `kind,health` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Number of sessions by kind and derived health state. |
| `moshwatch_metrics_rendered_sessions` | `gauge` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Number of session series rendered into the export. |
| `moshwatch_metrics_truncated_sessions` | `gauge` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Number of sessions omitted from the export due to render caps. |
| `moshwatch_runtime_dropped_sessions_total` | `counter` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Number of session tracking admissions or records dropped due to capacity limits. |
| `moshwatch_runtime_worker_threads` | `gauge` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Configured Tokio worker threads for moshwatchd. |
| `moshwatch_runtime_loop_interval_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `loop` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Configured interval for periodic daemon loops in milliseconds. |
| `moshwatch_runtime_loop_last_duration_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `loop` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Last observed runtime for a periodic daemon loop in milliseconds. |
| `moshwatch_runtime_loop_overruns_total` | `counter` | `1` | `loop` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Number of times a periodic daemon loop took longer than its configured interval. |
| `moshwatch_history_current_bytes` | `gauge` | `By` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Current on-disk bytes retained in persistent history. |
| `moshwatch_history_written_bytes_total` | `counter` | `By` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Total history bytes successfully written to disk. |
| `moshwatch_history_write_failures_total` | `counter` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Number of failed persistent history writes. |
| `moshwatch_history_prune_failures_total` | `counter` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Number of expired history files that failed to prune. |
| `moshwatch_history_dropped_samples_total` | `counter` | `1` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Number of history samples dropped because persistence exceeded its disk budget. |
| `moshwatch_threshold_rtt_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `severity` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Configured RTT threshold in milliseconds. |
| `moshwatch_threshold_retransmit_pct` | `gauge` | `%` | `severity` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Configured retransmit threshold as a percentage. |
| `moshwatch_threshold_silence_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `severity` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Configured silence threshold in milliseconds. |
| `moshwatch_otlp_export_enabled` | `gauge` | `1` | `detail_tier` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Whether OTLP metrics export is enabled for the daemon. |
| `moshwatch_otlp_exports_total` | `counter` | `1` | `result` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `low` | Number of OTLP metrics export attempts by result. |
| `moshwatch_otlp_export_last_duration_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Duration of the last OTLP metrics export attempt in milliseconds. |
| `moshwatch_otlp_export_last_success_unix_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Unix timestamp in milliseconds of the most recent successful OTLP metrics export. |
| `moshwatch_otlp_export_last_failure_unix_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Unix timestamp in milliseconds of the most recent failed OTLP metrics export. |
| `moshwatch_otlp_export_last_payload_bytes` | `gauge` | `By` | `none` | `aggregate_only` | `fleet_safe` | `static` | Size in bytes of the most recent OTLP metrics export payload. |

| `moshwatch_session_remote_state_age_ms` | `gauge` | `ms` | `session_id,kind` | `per_session` | `operator_sensitive` | `per_session` | Age in milliseconds since the peer last sent a new remote state. |
